checks.name: view_safety_ceiling
checks.description: View access is only permitted when: project is Active, user is in CR or PI role, CR conditions (clearance>3, not HighlyRestricted) or PI conditions (riskScore<20, compliant device), and department matches or user is GlobalAuditor

checks.name: edit_safety_ceiling
checks.description: Edit access is only permitted under the same conditions as View: Active project, CR or PI role with respective conditions, department match or GlobalAuditor

checks.name: cross_department_deny_view
checks.description: View is denied when user department != document projectManagingDepartment and user is not a GlobalAuditor

checks.name: cross_department_deny_edit
checks.description: Edit is denied when user department != document projectManagingDepartment and user is not a GlobalAuditor

checks.name: inactive_project_deny_view
checks.description: View is never permitted when project status is not Active

checks.name: inactive_project_deny_edit
checks.description: Edit is never permitted when project status is not Active

checks.name: floor_cr_view
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearance>3, same department, Active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to View

checks.name: floor_cr_edit
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearance>3, same department, Active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: floor_pi_view
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with same department, Active project, compliant device, riskScore<20 MUST be able to View

checks.name: floor_pi_edit
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with same department, Active project, compliant device, riskScore<20 MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: floor_auditor_cross_dept_view
checks.description: A GlobalAuditor+ClinicalResearcher with clearance>3, Active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc, different department MUST still be able to View (auditor loophole)

checks.name: liveness_view
checks.description: View policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_edit
checks.description: Edit policy is not trivially deny-all

results.description: View access is only permitted when: project is Active, user is in CR or PI role, CR conditions (clearance>3, not HighlyRestricted) or PI conditions (riskScore<20, compliant device), and department matches or user is GlobalAuditor
Edit access is only permitted under the same conditions as View: Active project, CR or PI role with respective conditions, department match or GlobalAuditor
View is denied when user department != document projectManagingDepartment and user is not a GlobalAuditor
Edit is denied when user department != document projectManagingDepartment and user is not a GlobalAuditor
View is never permitted when project status is not Active
Edit is never permitted when project status is not Active
A ClinicalResearcher with clearance>3, same department, Active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to View
A ClinicalResearcher with clearance>3, same department, Active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to Edit
A PrincipalInvestigator with same department, Active project, compliant device, riskScore<20 MUST be able to View
A PrincipalInvestigator with same department, Active project, compliant device, riskScore<20 MUST be able to Edit
A GlobalAuditor+ClinicalResearcher with clearance>3, Active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc, different department MUST still be able to View (auditor loophole)
View policy is not trivially deny-all
Edit policy is not trivially deny-all
